questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a stem-and-leaf plot in analyzing song durations?

options.A: To compare song durations across genres
options.B: To visualize the distribution of song durations
options.C: To calculate the mean song duration
options.D: To identify the most popular song
options.E: To determine the optimal song length

questions.question: A stem-and-leaf plot shows the distribution of $x \cdot 10$ canvas sizes. If the stem is 4 and the leaves are 2, 5, 8, what are the actual canvas sizes?
A music festival features $5 \cdot 10^2$ attendees. If the stem-and-leaf plot of attendee ages has a stem of 2 and leaves of 1, 4, 7, what are the ages of the attendees?
An artist creates $3 \cdot 10^2$ paintings with unique color palettes. The stem-and-leaf plot of color palette numbers has a stem of 1 and leaves of 2, 5, 9. What are the color palette numbers?
A stem-and-leaf plot shows the distribution of $x \cdot 100$ music downloads. If the stem is 8 and the leaves are 2, 5, 9, what are the actual download numbers?
A music school has $4 \cdot 10^2$ students. The stem-and-leaf plot of student practice times has a stem of 3 and leaves of 1, 4, 7. What are the practice times of the students?
An art museum features $2 \cdot 10^3$ exhibits. The stem-and-leaf plot of exhibit visitor counts has a stem of 1 and leaves of 2, 5, 9. What are the visitor counts?
A stem-and-leaf plot shows the distribution of $x \cdot 10^2$ book sales. If the stem is 5 and the leaves are 2, 7, 9, what are the actual book sales numbers?

Create a stem-and-leaf plot to display the distribution of the following $10 \cdot 10$ art piece prices: $150, 220, 180, 250, 200, 280, 230, 300, 260, 310$. Interpret the plot and describe the distribution of prices.

A music streaming platform has $10^3$ songs with unique beat-per-minute (BPM) values. The following stem-and-leaf plot represents the distribution of BPM values: 
Stem: 1
Leaves: 2, 5, 8
Stem: 2
Leaves: 1, 4, 7
Interpret the plot and describe the distribution of BPM values. Provide two insights about the data.

teacher_rules: Use a pencil to mark answers
